reconciliationNote: Reset from 'done' to 'in_progress' on 2026-05-23 by reconcile-to-doc (sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 3). state-transition-guard found 38 BLOCK findings; the prior 'done' promotion did not satisfy the current strict gates (G016, G022, G053, G060, plus SLA stress and change-boundary checks). Drift routed to bugs/BUG-031-006-strict-guard-gate-drift/ for finding-owned planning + delivery closure. Implementation on disk is real; gaps are governance/evidence and planning-coverage shaped.

scopeProgress.name: Artifact CRUD + Vector Search Integration Tests

executionHistory.summary: Manual cross-check verified test files exist on disk: tests/integration/{db_migration_test.go (305 lines, 8 TestMigrations_* funcs), nats_stream_test.go (401 lines), artifact_crud_test.go (1033 lines, includes Chaos_* variants), ml_readiness_test.go (4 TestMLReadiness_* funcs)} and tests/e2e/capture_process_search_test.go (166 lines). internal/api/ml_readiness.go (52 lines) implements WaitForMLReady with config-driven timeout.

Trace-guard closure pass: closed 7 of 10 trace failures (10→3 residual). Added Test Plan tables to Scopes 2, 5, 6 pointing at tests/integration/db_migration_test.go, tests/e2e/capture_process_search_test.go, tests/integration/ml_readiness_test.go. Added G068 Scenario "<name>" prefixes to existing DoD bullets in Scopes 2, 5, 6. Appended Trace-Guard Closure section to report.md listing per-scope full repo-relative test paths. Residual: Scopes 1 (Integration Test Infrastructure), 3 (NATS Stream Integration Tests), 4 (Artifact CRUD + Vector Search) lack Gherkin scenarios; adding new Gherkin scenarios is bubbles.plan ownership (agent rule). Routing to bubbles.plan recommended. No source/test/config/framework changes; no DoD content rewriting (only "Scenario \"<name>\": " prefixes). artifact-lint PASSED, traceability-guard residual=3 (Gherkin-missing). No status/certification field changes.

Authored 8 Gherkin scenarios across scopes 1, 3, 4 (SCN-LST-005/006 integration test stack isolation + cleanup helpers, SCN-LST-007/008/009 EnsureStreams + pub/sub + Nak redelivery, SCN-LST-010/011/012 pgvector similarity + annotation aggregation + JSONB containment) to close trace-guard residuals. Reused existing scenario-manifest.json IDs. Added Use Cases (Gherkin) and Test Plan subsections referencing tests/integration/helpers_test.go, nats_stream_test.go, artifact_crud_test.go. traceability-guard PASSED (0 warnings); artifact-lint PASSED. No status/certification field changes.

Stochastic-quality-sweep R18/20 (seed 20260513) — devops-to-doc child workflow probe of live-stack testing infrastructure. Verified test-environment isolation (SST drives compose_project=smackerel-test, ports 47001-47004, named volumes smackerel-test-*), test fixture freshness (down --volumes pre+post), KEEP_STACK_UP=1 ownership contract (spec 037 Scope 10), test data identifiability (testID(t)=test-{TestName}-{UnixNano}), Build-Once Deploy-Many separation (build.yml stops at registry push), and CI integration job's deliberate raw-go-test divergence (documented in ci.yml lines 136-139). Identified 4 specialist-class findings (DEVOPS-031-001 missing E2E in CI, DEVOPS-031-002 integration job main-only, DEVOPS-031-003 no parallel-test infra for integration lane, DEVOPS-031-004 no leak-detector after down --volumes); all logged as concerns[] in report.md R18 section. Outcome: done_with_concerns. No source/test/config/framework changes; report.md and state.json executionHistory only.

Stochastic-quality-sweep sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 3 of 30 — reconcile-to-doc child workflow (parent-expanded; runSubagent unavailable in nested runtime). Ran authoritative state-transition-guard pass against the spec-claimed status of 'done'. Guard exited 1 with 38 BLOCK failures and 2 warnings across: Gate G060 (no scenario-first TDD red→green markers), Gate G022 (4 required specialist phases missing — regression/simplify/stabilize/security — and 5 phase-claim provenance violations — chaos/docs/test/audit/validate appear in completedPhaseClaims without matching bubbles.<phase> executionHistory entries), Gate G016 (18 regression E2E planning items missing across all 6 scopes — DoD item, broader regression suite DoD item, and Test Plan row), Check 8D (3 change-boundary items missing — section, DoD item, allowed/excluded surfaces; triggered by 'cleanup' keyword usage in test helper context), Gate G053 (report.md missing '### Code Diff Evidence' subsection), Check 5A (Scope 6 has explicit 60s ML readiness timeout = SLA-sensitive but no stress test), Check 17 (no structured 'spec(031)' / 'bubbles(031/...)' commit on file). Reset top-level status and certification.status from 'done' to 'in_progress' (previous values preserved in 'previousStatus' fields for audit). artifact-lint.sh continues to pass (loose check accepts completedPhaseClaims at face value); only the strict state-transition-guard rejects the prior promotion. Implementation on disk is verified real — 52 integration test functions, 24 E2E test functions, internal/api/ml_readiness.go (52 LOC). Drift is governance/evidence shaped, not implementation shaped, but still requires planning-owned scope edits and a fresh evidence pass. Created BUG-031-006-strict-guard-gate-drift with full 6-artifact planning packet to route remediation through bubbles.design → bubbles.plan → bubbles.implement → bubbles.test → bubbles.regression → bubbles.simplify → bubbles.stabilize → bubbles.security → bubbles.validate → bubbles.audit → bubbles.chaos → bubbles.docs → bubbles.workflow.finalize. No source/test/config/framework changes; edits limited to specs/031-live-stack-testing/{state.json,report.md} and the new bugs/BUG-031-006-* packet.
